ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the job posting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the job is based */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the company where the job is located */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the job posting is currently active */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting was last modified */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the job posting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the candidate applied for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who applied */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the candidate */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the candidate */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate applied */,
  "application_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the application */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the candidate applied */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the application is rejected */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the application was last updated */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_application_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_status_id") REFERENCES application_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the candidate */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the candidate */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the candidate */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the candidate */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the candidate */,
  "linked_in_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile URL of the candidate */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* Portfolio URL of the candidate */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate's information is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_processes" (
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening process */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application being screened */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the screening process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the screening process */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the screening event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the screening process was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the screening process */,
  "screening_stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening stage */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interviewer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the interviewer provided feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_processes_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_processes_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_processes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screening_processes_screening_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("screening_stage_id") REFERENCES screening_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hiring manager, recruiter) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether this status is the default status for new applications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screening_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screening stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the screening stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the screening stage */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether this stage is required for all candidates */,
  "duration_estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the screening stage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application the note is about */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the job application */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Whether the note is confidential and should not be shared with all users */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., technical, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_notes_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES job_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications_screening_processes" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job application */,
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the screening process for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id", "screening_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_job_postings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "role_in_posting" TEXT /* Role the user plays in the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_postings_screening_processes" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "screening_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screening process */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Whether the screening process is mandatory for the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id", "screening_id")
)
